behavior_summary: U8P_STANSTON::release is a short utility process that tests the current object's surface weight and, if that weight equals zero, awards 15 points of dexterity by calling AccumulateDexterity(0x0F).
No global flags are read or written by this script; its only observable effect is the conditional dexterity accumulation.
The process is likely invoked by an item U8P_STANSTON::release/drop event (process type 0x020D) though the exact trigger context is inferred rather than explicit in the script.
notable_control_flow: U8P_STANSTON::release calls Item::getSurfaceWeight(this) -> compares returned value to 0; if equal then call AccumulateDexterity(0x0F); otherwise do nothing.
open_questions: Which actor receives the dexterity? (AccumulateDexterity is called but the implicit target — owner, user, or global actor — is not explicit in the snippet.)
What exact engine event or player action schedules the processType 0x020D for this item? (Inferred to be a U8P_STANSTON::release/drop event but not explicit.)
Are there additional contextual guards (ownership, location, or actor state) applied by surrounding systems before this process runs?

main_function.name: U8P_STANSTON::release
main_function.purpose: Check the current object's surface weight and grant 15 dexterity if the surface weight is zero.
entry_conditions: Inferred: invoked when the item is released/dropped or its U8P_STANSTON::release lifecycle runs.

function_map.name: U8P_STANSTON::release
function_map.role: Utility process that conditionally awards dexterity based on the item's surface weight.

function_map.name: Item::getSurfaceWeight
function_map.role: Return the surface weight of the referenced object; used here to test for zero weight.

function_map.name: AccumulateDexterity
function_map.role: Increase or award dexterity (or dexterity experience) by the supplied amount (called with 0x0F).

external_calls.purpose: Query the current object's surface weight to determine whether it equals zero.
Grant 15 dexterity (0x0F) when the surface weight check passes.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_STANSTON::release is a short utility process that tests the current object's surface weight and, if that weight equals zero, awards 15 points of dexterity by calling AccumulateDexterity(0x0F).
